Creates a prefillTransformer function th.notes: Created prefillTransformer that extracts ssn, vaFileNumber, and builds fullName from firstName/middleName/lastName/suffix. Returns all three at root level.

Imports and adds profilePersonalInfoPage.notes: Imports from platform/forms-system/src/js/patterns/prefill and spreads ...profilePersonalInfoPage({...}) into new veteranInfoChapter with personalInfoConfig for name, ssn, vaFileNumber, dateOfBirth.

Imports and adds profileContactInfoPages.notes: Imports profileContactInfoPages and spreads ...profileContactInfoPages({...}) with included: mailingAddress, email, homePhone, mobilePhone.

Adds route protection logic in App.jsx t.notes: Adds Redux connect, checks isLoggedIn and formData?.ssn, redirects to manifest.rootUrl. Skips protection on localhost and intro page.

Creates or updates mock test fixtures (s.notes: Updates sip-get.json to include ssn, vaFileNumber in data.attributes.veteran structure. Updates returnUrl to /personal-information.

Does not remove or break any existing fo.notes: Keeps existing veteranServiceMemberInfoChapter pages (claimantAddressPage, veteranServiceMemberInfoPage, veteranAddressPage) intact in a separate chapter after the new prefill chapter.

Registers prefillTransformer in formConf.notes: Adds prefillTransformer property to formConfig after prefillEnabled: true.
